subjects_num.Description: Total number of unique subjects in this derivative dataset

sessions_num.Description: Total number of sessions across all subjects, or 'n/a' if single-session

output_num.Description: Total number of output files across all subjects in this derivative

output_size.Description: Total size of all output files in this derivative

nifti_num.Description: Total number of NIfTI files (.nii, .nii.gz) across all subjects

nifti_size.Description: Total size of NIfTI files across all subjects

html_num.Description: Total number of HTML report files across all subjects
